top_10_recommendations.recommendation: Plan opportunistic splits for 250+ line files.
Keep medium-sized files focused to prevent further bloat.
Audit navigation-heavy specs for explicit synchronization around async state transitions.
Prefer fixture-scoped context generation over module-scoped mutable context.
Pair stateful setup with explicit teardown or ephemeral fixture boundaries.
Move module-level context creation into fixture/test scope where feasible.
Map wrapper/case files to executable parent specs in traceability output.
Improve assertion density in sparse-assertion files.
Increase explicit negative-path assertions in files lacking refusal/error checks.
Split >300-line specs to improve runtime distribution across CI shards.
